name: cockroachdb
description: Connect Claude Code directly to your CockroachDB clusters for hands-on database work — explore schemas, write optimized SQL, debug queries, and manage distributed database clusters. This plugin provides tools across MCP backends (self-hosted MCP Toolbox and managed CockroachDB Cloud MCP Server), specialized agents (DBA, Developer, Operator), skills across operational domains, and built-in safety hooks.

hooks.command: python3 -c 'import sys, os, runpy; p = os.path.normpath(r"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/validate-sql.py"); p = ("\\?\\" + p) if os.name == "nt" else p; runpy.run_path(p, run_name="__main__")'; exit 0

python3 -c 'import sys, os, runpy; p = os.path.normpath(r"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/check-sql-files.py"); p = ("\\?\\" + p) if os.name == "nt" else p; runpy.run_path(p, run_name="__main__")'; exit 0

cockroachdb-toolbox-http._comment: SSE transport — run 'toolbox --config tools.yaml' first, then connect via this URL
